nasb.text: You set a boundary that they may not pass over, So that they will not return to cover the earth.

esv.text: You set a boundary that they may not pass, so that they might not again cover the earth.

cnv.text: 你定了界限，使眾水不能越過； 它們不再轉回掩蓋大地。

ccb.text: 你为众水划定不可逾越的界线， 以免大地再遭淹没。

csbs.text: 你设立了界限，它们就不能越过， 不再转回遮盖大地。
